name: Valorant
description: A Valorant server template with rank channels (Iron through Radiant), agent discussion channels per role (Duelist, Controller, Sentinel, Initiator), a team finder channel, clip sharing, a patch notes section, and staff/mod roles alongside rank-based member roles.
